revision.comment: [[:File:Stop hand nuvola.svg]] is licensed under "Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 2.5", link is required for attribution — Undid revision 987128260 by [[Special:Contributions/JsfasdF252|JsfasdF252]] ([[User talk:JsfasdF252|talk]])
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Update to make no parameter less bold red as it’s not so urgent
1 revision imported: attempting to fix the nihongo
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Update to make no parameter less bold red as it’s not so urgent
1 revision imported: lets hope this fixes it since the qq=draft was showing up
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
this template is not "safe", its "safe for use in [[WP:Citation templates|citation templates]]''
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=COinS_safe here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=COinS_safe for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ombox
  |type={{#ifeq: {{{1|}}}|n|content|notice}}
  |image={{#ifeq: {{{1|}}}|n|[[File:Commons-emblem-hand-orange.svg|50px|alt=icon]]|[[File:Commons-emblem-success.svg|50px|alt=icon]]}}
  |text={{#ifeq: {{{1|}}}|n
    |This template '''should not be used in [[WP:Citation templates|citation templates]]''' such as [[Help:Citation Style 1|Citation Style 1]] and [[Help:Citation Style 2|Citation Style 2]], because it includes markup that will pollute the [[COinS]] metadata they produce; see [[Wikipedia:COinS]]. {{{addtext|}}}{{Sandbox other||{{category handler
      |all=      |nocat={{{nocat|}}}
      }}}}
    |This template is '''safe for use in [[WP:Citation templates|citation templates]]''' that produce [[COinS]] metadata; see [[Wikipedia:COinS]]. If HTML or other markup is added, then its use must be reevaluated. {{{addtext|}}}
  }}
}}<noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Please add categories to the /doc subpage, and interwikis at Wikidata (see Wikipedia:Wikidata) --> 

[[Category:Templates not safe for use in citation templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
